replies.author: @Deadworld1
replies.text:
Exactly what you would expect from a population that idolizes and worships their corrupt leaders. (Notice the way democrats get genuinely frothing-at-the-mouth angry when you say negative things about their favorite?)
Exactly what you would expect from a population that thinks "if a judge says it, it _IS_ lawful. That's what being a judge means!" (No, it's doesn't and no, it's not.) or "If the police arrested a person, then they're guilty!" 
Most people seem to think this way, even if they refuse to admit it. Someone being arrested holds a lot of stigma. The court of public opinion _used_ to be rightly ignored and dismissed. But then we let liberals replace all the teachers for the last 40 years and now we have a population that thinks that violence is the worst thing imaginable... BUT since criminals and generally bad people use violence frequently, it's acceptable in a twisted way for _them_ to do it. It's expected. But when a "good" person uses violence, it now means that person is as bad as the criminal. Because that's what they have been taught. Our country has been made into a bunch of bystanders who think that tolerating evil is some-crazy-how the same as trying to stop it.
Basically, we suck and quite honestly deserve some measure of suffering for what we have allowed ourselves to become. For what we have done to the future of our children and grandchildren. 
I know some might want to say "it's not too late", but you know... normally for that statement to have value, the process of fixing things should have actually started properly. But here we are, with insurrectionists (actual real ones this time) are getting zero consequences from our corrupt government and the most anyone is willing to do about it is cry on camera on whine on internet comments. There is no fixing this if we keep up this pattern. We will just lose to the people who _are_ willing to get their hands dirty.
A number of republican candidates running to oppose various democrats have been murdered recently... (You know, because the enemy is 110% okay with violence. They abuse our decency to do further harm and confuse people.)
